name: Grid My Business
description:
What Grid My Business Does?

Grid My Business is a local SEO tool that helps amplify your local search visibility by tracking your business and competitor’s local rank tracking and by providing consistent monitoring updates every 3 days.

‍

Source: G2

‍

Features:

➡️ Delivers localized search ranking outcomes

➡️ Integrates seamlessly with GMB

➡️ Enables scheduled scans for effortless monitoring

➡️ Keeps tabs on local business rivals

➡️ Conducts bulk analysis of queries

Benefits:

⭐️ Helps more people find your business in local searches.

⭐️ Simplifies handling your Google My Business listing.

⭐️ Provides clear insights into your listing's performance.

⭐️ Keeps your listing fresh, attracting more customers.

⭐️ Offers insights into competitors' listings for staying ahead.

⭐️ Helps maintain a positive online image by managing reviews.

⭐️ Adapts to businesses of all sizes for growth.

Pros:

✅ Quick and easy GMB integration

✅ Flexible location pin positioning (added as a new feature)

✅ Easy to use and has a simple interface

Cons:

❌ Does not have API integrations 

❌ Limited features 

❌ Not very cost-effective 

‍

Priced at $29 Per Month
what_people_say:
Likes: 

‍

“Grid My Business is easy to use and has a simple interface. It is useful for local businesses and companies that are managing Google Business Profiles of multiple business owners. In a few clicks, we can check in a certain area, for a certain keyword, what our business profile ranks in comparison to our competitors. We can select targetted areas, keywords, and grid sizes to check local visibility. We can compare our visibility with competitors and we can even run a detailed analysis of our competitors' profiles. We can consistently monitor critical profiles and schedule visibility reports.”

‍

Dislikes: 

‍

“Grid My Business is a good tool but still, it is lacking at some points. It does not offer an API service, therefore one cannot integrate it with its software. It does not provide features to check rankings/visibility for mobile and desktop devices separately as Google has a separate mobile bot so we will never know if there's a variation in rankings. The ranking data it provides is sometimes inaccurate compared to that checked manually. So, all-in-all it is useful for organizations that are not checking data for some serious stuff.”

‍

*Review sourced and cited through G2*

‍
